items.title:
[正面] [h1]基本プレイ無料のデッキ型ローグライク[/h1]
戦略性が高く、キャラクター育成要素や戦闘エフ...
items.summary:
[h1]基本プレイ無料のデッキ型ローグライク[/h1]
戦略性が高く、キャラクター育成要素や戦闘エフェクトも綺麗で楽しめます。

日本語はまだテスト段階との事ですが完成度は高く、プレイに支障が出るほどの問題は無いと思います。
（一部テキストが一致しない部分はありますが、アイコンと文字色で見分けがつく。）

【パーティー編成について】
戦闘は4人編成。
キャラクターには領域（混沌・深海・血肉・超次元）という属性的なものがあり、
深海・血肉・超次元のキャラクターは同じパーティには組ませられない。
その代わりに上記3種のキャラクターが1人でもパーティにいると特殊な戦闘ギミックが追加されます。
[table]
    [tr]
        [th]領域[/th]
        [th]特徴[/th]
    [/tr]
    [tr]
        [td]混沌[/td]
        [td]混沌のキャラクターは、深海・血肉・超次元パーティと組ませる事ができる。混沌4人パーティの場合は、鍵令（汎用スキル的なもの）を頻繁に使えるようになる[/td]
    [/tr]
    [tr]
        [td]深海[/td]
        [td]戦闘を補助（攻撃・防御等）する触手がギミックとして加わる。主にこの触手を強化して戦うのが深海キャラクターの特徴。シンプルで扱いやすい。[/td]
    [/tr]
    [tr]
        [td]血肉[/td]
        [td]専用の血肉ゲージが追加される。戦闘中にゲージを貯めていくことで、血肉キャラクターの必殺技を強化して戦うのが特徴。HP減らしたりするキャラが多いのでちょっと難しい。[/td]
    [/tr]
　[tr]
        [td]超次元[/td]
        [td]サブデッキがギミックに追加される。戦闘中に一部のカードをサブデッキに送り、サブデッキが満タンになると追加ターンを得て再行動するのが特徴。カードを使用する順番が重要になってくるので難易度高め。[/td]
    [/tr]
[/table]

基本的なパーティ編成は
・領域一致の4人
・混沌+深海or血肉or超次元
のどちらかになると思います。
序盤は混沌領域の防御系かヒーラー系のキャラを育てておくとどのパーティーにも入れられるので進めやすいです。
コンテンツクリアの為に各領域のキャラクターを求められることもあるので、それぞれ1体は確保しておくことをお勧めします。

items.title: [负面] The card-battle aspect of this game is really fun,...
items.summary: The card-battle aspect of this game is really fun, and I do like the lore. But this game just feels a little like it doesn't know what it wants to be. It has a gacha mechanic, it has a visual novel feature, it has card battles. It's overwhelming. There's 1,000 things to click on & keep up with. This game could be so much better if it was simplified.

items.title: [负面] First and foremost, every and anyone saying this i...
items.summary:
First and foremost, every and anyone saying this is "like Slay the Spire" just doesn't ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ know what they're talking about. This game has NOTHING to do with Slay the Spire unless your only comparison is "it has cards". Slay the Spire is a roguelike (or roguelite, whatever) game. This game has set cards for each characters and that's it. Now with that out of the way...

The idea of making a Cthullu-ish anime inspired game is interesting. The characters look pretty enough, the art is amazing heavily on the Reverse 1999 side (this is how you make comparisons), and the gameplay is the typical card game where you have a "mana system" they call Arithimetica... The flow of combat follows the same as any card game, you use a card with a cost and reduce your Arithimetica, card has effects, etc. Music and sound design is really good. Monsters are quite unique.

The gatcha system is ♥♥♥♥. Garbage. Totally horrible. Everyone that says "it is easy to get an SSR" either got paid to say that or got really lucky or is straight up lying. It is not. You do gain SSR characters for free during story, and you get the free ones from the selectors, but bannerwise it is the worst gatcha I've seen so far. The idea behind the pitty system is interesting since you do 5 pulls instead of 10 and in 30 pulls an SSR is allegedly guaranteed, but there isn't any way of guaranteeing the banner characters. At all. So if you get lucky and get one copy of the banner character you might never get a duplicate of it.

The game has the stupid trope convensions of "talk to your characters and build relationships!" ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥. I get it, china-man is lonely and need 2D waifu, but that is just annoying instead of refreshing. Every single china game has it now and it sucks. The game has the same old 200 different upgrade materials you need to grind your ass to get to lvl up and max out your character. The game has 2 separate gear systems. I didn't had the patience to get to the second system that seems to be the RNG one (the one with stats and substats). Apparently you would need a ♥♥♥♥ TON of dupes for your character, not only 6 as usual. The pvp is absolutely weird, characters completely change their kits, cards are effects playable instead of passives, but overall it seems quite unique, and it is live pvp. Everyone complains about the AI translator, and they are right. It does a poor job at translating it.

Overall, Art good, Sound good, Gameplay good, Gatcha bad, Translation bad, Story mid.

If you like story gatcha go play Limbus Company.

items.title: [正面] 神父池入坑，到现在也玩了大半年，一直玩的是港服，今天更新后终于能和steam互通，刷了点时长来写评论...
items.summary:
神父池入坑，到现在也玩了大半年，一直玩的是港服，今天更新后终于能和steam互通，刷了点时长来写评论了
30抽小保底90抽大保底，在一众二游中真的还算友好，虽说都被调侃高启强，低启也不是不能玩，超维小玫瑰只有本体，图鲁墨菲都是二启，深海和超维也仍然能玩。融灾全打二层325即可，主线和活动随便吃灵知首通，有扫荡，PVP用系统卡也不刚需密契，想肝可以很肝，想咸上线扫荡3分钟结束。目前还在玩另外两个游戏（FGO和崩铁），都很长草，5771的地位在我这已经主线上升为主游了
首冲月卡大月卡一直在续，周年首冲重置，如果周年卡（大概率是塔薇？）强度不错，冲个+4本体+3专武支持一下。希望能够坚持运营下去吧，愿银钥指引我们

items.title:
[正面] 现代的浮夸克苏鲁风游戏，偏向于血肉畸形怪物的那一方面。
战斗逻辑杀戮尖塔那一套，基本没啥太大的底层...
items.summary:
现代的浮夸克苏鲁风游戏，偏向于血肉畸形怪物的那一方面。
战斗逻辑杀戮尖塔那一套，基本没啥太大的底层改动，玩过爬塔的玩家一眼就懂，需要学的就是他自己的几个新机制。
卡池还不错，出货率还行，脸黑的话歪率能比得上方舟，抽卡资源给的也算很大方，没有特别抠搜。
服务器不知道在哪，不开加速器也能直连，但是会时不时的loading一下，开了加速器虽然还是红延迟，但是玩起来没事了。
10分制整体游戏会给个8.5-8.8左右吧，每天上限压力也不大，还算不错。

items.title: [正面] 杀戮尖塔和卡牌完美结合，数值设定合理，不用氪就能很好的体验，因为氪少了没啥提升的

demo domo arigatou gozaimasu!

items.title: [正面] Do you like Yaoguai Hunter, or Slay The Spire, or ...
items.summary:
Do you like Yaoguai Hunter, or Slay The Spire, or Across The Obelisk, or Knock On The Coffin Lid, or similar games to those?

Do you think anime is pretty neat, but so is heckin' H.P. Lovecrafterino?

Are you a seasoned veteran of CN/KR/JP games that use bad MTL, and you're willing to forgive a studio doing it because they're new and this is their first game?

You will like Morimens, if you answered yes to Question 3 and were at least ambivalent about 1 and 2!

Possessed of amazing artistic and visual design, solid sound design, and a gacha so generous it makes you feel flush with riches (I know that's easy to say, but seriously, I mean it. They hand you these rolls like they're having a fire sale.), Morimens is a very solid game that scratches the itch of 'Roguelite Teambuilder Gacha'. 

I wish there was more of a deckbuilding angle, but it's fine - Morimens has other unique ways to keep things fresh in every fight. And, while it isn't afraid to give you oodles of SSRs and free rolls, it also isn't afraid to send one across your jaw if you get too uppity. The first act's final-final boss was genuinely pretty worrying, and I think I only succeeded as well as I did because of blind luck with the sort of team I built (ULTRA TEAMS FTW though the others are cool I really want a Caro team). 

It's good. It's a good game. And it's free - so if you try it and don't like it, what's the issue? If you like deckbuilders, team-based roguelites, and cosmic horror, you'll like Morimens. Give it a go!

items.title: [正面] Периодически захожу в нее поиграть. Нравится пвп р...
items.summary: Периодически захожу в нее поиграть. Нравится пвп режим против игроков , фармить компанию стало нудно. Дизайн персов мне нравится. Часто присылают на почту какие нибудь подарочки. Жаль нельзя никак контактировать с другими пользователями, можно только лайкнуть профиль и посмотреть кто лайкнул тебя.
